list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM events WHERE model IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project_path FROM events WHERE project_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM events_with_cost WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote})
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM events_with_cost WHERE ts >= date_trunc('day', now())

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(cache_read + input_tokens + cache_creation_5m + cache_creation_1h) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(cache_read)::float / SUM(cache_read + input_tokens + cache_creation_5m + cache_creation_1h) END AS hit_rate FROM events WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM events

SELECT (COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) / 7.0 * 30.0) AS projected_monthly FROM events_with_cost WHERE ts > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) / NULLIF(${daily_budget}::float, 0) AS pct FROM events_with_cost WHERE ts >= date_trunc('day', now()) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote})
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) / 15.0 AS burn FROM events_with_cost WHERE ts > now() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote})

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), model AS metric, SUM(cost_usd) AS value FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), 'input' AS metric, SUM(input_tokens) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), 'output', SUM(output_tokens) FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), 'cache_read', SUM(cache_read) FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), 'cache_create_5m', SUM(cache_creation_5m) FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), 'cache_create_1h', SUM(cache_creation_1h) FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts, '$__interval'), COALESCE(model, '(none)') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS msgs, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 3 DESC

SELECT project_path AS project, COUNT(*) AS msgs, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT COALESCE(active_skill, '(none)') AS skill, COUNT(*) AS msgs, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 30

WITH ev_tool_count AS (SELECT event_id, COUNT(*) AS n_tools FROM tool_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND event_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_id) SELECT tc.tool_name, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(SUM(ec.cost_usd / NULLIF(etc.n_tools, 0))::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd, ROUND(AVG(ec.cost_usd / NULLIF(etc.n_tools, 0))::numeric, 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM tool_calls tc JOIN events_with_cost ec ON tc.event_id = ec.id JOIN ev_tool_count etc ON tc.event_id = etc.event_id WHERE $__timeFilter(tc.ts) AND ec.model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND ec.project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY tc.tool_name ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

SELECT session_id, project_path, MIN(ts) AS started, MAX(ts) AS last_ts, COUNT(*) AS events, SUM(input_tokens) AS tokens_in, SUM(output_tokens) AS tokens_out, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30
SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM tool_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT COALESCE(skill_arg, '(none)') AS skill, COUNT(*) AS invocations FROM tool_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND tool_name = 'Skill' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 30

WITH ev_tool_count AS (SELECT event_id, COUNT(*) AS n_tools FROM tool_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND event_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_id), mcp_server AS (SELECT tc.event_id, CASE WHEN tc.tool_name LIKE 'mcp\_\_%' ESCAPE '\' THEN split_part(substring(tc.tool_name FROM 6), '__', 1) ELSE '(non-mcp)' END AS mcp_server FROM tool_calls tc WHERE $__timeFilter(tc.ts)) SELECT ms.mcp_server, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(SUM(ec.cost_usd / NULLIF(etc.n_tools, 0))::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd FROM mcp_server ms JOIN events_with_cost ec ON ms.event_id = ec.id JOIN ev_tool_count etc ON ms.event_id = etc.event_id WHERE ec.model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND ec.project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY ms.mcp_server ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30

SELECT ROUND(percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS p50, ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS p95, ROUND(percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS p99, ROUND(MAX(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS max FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) AND cost_usd > 0
SELECT cost_usd FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) AND cost_usd > 0 AND cost_usd < 1.0

SELECT LPAD(EXTRACT(hour FROM ts AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::int::text, 2, '0') AS hour_utc, COUNT(*) AS msgs, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd)::numeric, 6) AS avg_cost_per_msg FROM events_with_cost WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND model IN (${model:singlequote}) AND project_path IN (${project:singlequote}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT id, started_at, finished_at, status, files_seen, lines_read, events_inserted, tool_calls_inserted, jsonb_array_length(errors) AS errors FROM parser_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT pg_database_size(current_database())::bigint AS bytes
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM events_with_cost WHERE missing_rate
